name: Darkfuse Medichopper
specialEffect: Use: Command the Medichopper to attach to your target, absorbing 155184 damage and granting them 1375 versatility for 15 sec. /nWhile attached, your healing spells have a chance to refuel the chopper, granting these bonuses to their host again. (2 Min Cooldown)

name: Gigazap's Zap-Cap
specialEffect:
Equip: Every 6 sec, Zap your target and 1 nearby enemy for 29883 Nature damage. 
Casting 30 spells Turbo-Charges you for 15 sec, doubling the frequency of your Zaps and upgrading them into Giga-Zaps, dealing 89649 Nature Damage instead.

name: Improvised Seaforium Pacemaker
specialEffect:
Equip: Repurpose a Seaforium charge to give your heart a kick, causing your first ability every 60 sec to trigger Explosive Adrenaline, granting 2624 Critical Strike for 15 sec.
While exploding, Critical Strikes cause you to blow up again, extending this duration by 1 sec, up to 15 times.

name: Ringing Ritual Mud
specialEffect:
Use: Become Mudborne, absorbing 7088217 damage and pulsing 349350 Nature damage split between nearby enemies over 10 sec.
Periodic damage you take coalesces into pungent mud to feed the ritual, reducing this cooldown by 22 sec. (2 Min Cooldown)

name: Bursting Lightshard
specialEffect: Use: Summon a Bursting Lightspawn which sacrifices its health to unleash Bursts of Light, inflicting 57024 Holy damage split between nearby enemies every 2 sec while it lives. (2 Min Cooldown)

name: Signet of the Priory
specialEffect: Use: Raise your signet to the Light, increasing your highest secondary stat by 2756 for 20 sec. Your act inspires nearby signetbearers within your party, granting them 73 of the same stat for 20 sec. (2 Min Cooldown)

name: Tome of Light's Devotion
specialEffect:
Equip: Advance to the 50 Verses of Inner Resilience, reading as you are attacked.
Inner Resilience increases your armor by 150 and grants your attacks a chance to invoke a ward which absorbs 3781 Magic damage. When finished, sift through the passages to another chapter.
Use: Sift through the passages in the tome with increased Radiance. (1 Min, 30 Sec Cooldown)

name: Cursed Stone Idol
specialEffect: Use: Channel for 1 sec to invoke the wrath of the idol, increasing your Critical Strike by 5143 for 15 sec. The force slams the earth, dealing 78676 Nature damage to all nearby enemies and increasing Critical Strike by 265 per enemy hit, up to a maximum of 6000. (1 Min, 30 Sec Cooldown)

name: Sunblood Amethyst
specialEffect: Use: Tear the anima from your target dealing 3298 Shadow damage and forming a font of power at your feet, increasing your Intellect by 31 for 15 sec while you stand within it. (1 Min, 30 Sec Cooldown)

name: Harvester's Edict
specialEffect: Equip: Your damaging spells and abilities have a chance to send an orb of volatile black blood drifting to your target, exploding for 55918 Shadow damage split between all nearby enemies on impact. Intercepting the orb allows you to siphon its power, instead increasing your Mastery by 1653 for 15 sec.

name: Ceaseless Swarmgland
specialEffect: Equip: The gland releases pheromones that attract a Ceaseless Swarm of insects to surround you. Taking damage has a high chance to retaliate against attackers, inflicting 16356 Nature damage over 6 sec and reducing damage dealt to you by 3781.

name: Ara-Kara Sacbrood
specialEffect: Equip: Your abilities have a chance to stir the sac, releasing an egg which grants you 213 Primary Stat. Each egg hatches after 1 min, and the new brood attacks your next target, inflicting 12784 Nature damage over 8 sec. (100ms cooldown)

name: Empowering Crystal of Anub'ikkaj
specialEffect: Equip: Your spells and abilities have a chance to let loose a nascent empowerment from the crystal, increasing a random secondary stat by 1392 for 20 sec.

name: Void Pactstone
specialEffect:
Equip: Your attacks have a chance to call to the pact, exploding for 35361 Shadow damage split between nearby enemies and increasing your Haste by 377 for 10 sec.
Your death breaks the pact, causing a violent explosion.
